title: AimAirDrops
description: 🪂 AimAirDrops 🪂 – It is a customizable Airdrops System for your Server.
body:
🪂AimAirDrops🪂

AimAirDrops is a plugin that adds an airdrops system to your Minecraft server. It allows airdrops to fall from the sky with custom visual effects, preconfigured loot, and seamless integration for survival or minigame modes.

To fully enjoy the visual experience, make sure to use the corresponding Parachute Texture Pack for your game version.

🎒 Texture Pack Downloads

🟢 For Minecraft 1.20.x
🔗 [ Parachute Texture Pack 1.20x ](https://www.mediafire.com/file/4c7fi1uznxrwwau/Paracaidas+TexturePack+%281.20x%29+bySunny.zip)

🟣 For Minecraft 1.21.x
🔗 [Parachute Texture Pack 1.21x ](https://www.mediafire.com/file/202e1dyjtzuxt7f/Paracaidas_TexturePack_%25281.21x%2529_bySunny.zip)
